- **Path:** Reltio Documentation Portal v2 sitemap > Developer resources > Statistics Reporting Services APIs > Statistics Reporting Services APIs

              "id": "12345-1a2BCDE",
              "user": "dnb_connector",
              "method": "POST",
              "url": "/reltio/api/Docs7MkLqP92VnRt/entities",
              "clientType": "UNKNOWN",
              "timestamp": 1730715425759,
              "objectUri": "entities/3K9XTPq",
              "objectType": "configuration/entityTypes/B2BOrganization",
              "objectLabel": "ABCDE ORG",
              "data": {
                  "mergeReason": "Merge by crosswalks",
                  "mergeType": "CROSSWALKS",
                  "entities/7Wx2ZLn": "Abcde Organization",
                  "potentialMatches": "entities/7Wx2ZLn",
                  "type": "ENTITIES_MERGED",
                  "crosswalks": "configuration/sources/DnB;null;123456789,configuration/sources/DnB;null;012345678"
```

**Conclusions:**

By design, the connector merges the profiles by crosswalks. After the transfer, the entity has 2 DUNS numbers.

## When you know the customer tenant and want to find the respective data tenant

Use *get profile by a tenant name* endpoint. It will return the customer tenant, profile name, and the data tenant (if the data tenant exists).

## Background jobs (monitoring, batch) do not work

In most cases, some errors happened during background job operations.

1. Find the *Job ID*. For more information, see [Get Jobs List](https://docs.reltio.com/en/developer-resources/data-integration-apis/data-integration-apis-at-a-glance/db-connector-apis/get-jobs-list?utm_source=ai-corpus&utm_medium=markdown&utm_campaign=reltio-ai-ready-docs), [Get Job Status](https://docs.reltio.com/en/developer-resources/data-integration-apis/data-integration-apis-at-a-glance/db-connector-apis/get-job-status?utm_source=ai-corpus&utm_medium=markdown&utm_campaign=reltio-ai-ready-docs)

#### Autosubscribe action - Example 2

- **URL:** https://docs.reltio.com/en/applications/data-integrations/data-enrichment-integrations-at-a-glance/reltio-data-tenant-subscription-service-dtss-at-a-glance/reltio-dtss-set-up/subscription-configuration/synchronization-configuration/autosubscribe-action/autosubscribe-action---example-2?utm_source=ai-corpus&utm_medium=markdown&utm_campaign=reltio-ai-ready-docs

For more information, see [Data Cleanse Task (Asynchronous)](https://docs.reltio.com/en/developer-resources/system-administration-apis/system-administration-apis-at-a-glance/tasks-api/data-cleanse-task-asynchronous?utm_source=ai-corpus&utm_medium=markdown&utm_campaign=reltio-ai-ready-docs)
